Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JACOBS, SPOTSWOOD & CASPER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR CARL DURHAM AND AUGUSTUS VASTARDIS.
Appearances: Richard D. Spotswood of Jacobs Spotswood & Casper, LLP (389.1590) counsel for plaintiffs and moving to be relieved; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted to the extent that a bankruptcy court automatic stay is not in place as to either or both of the two parties that permission is sought to withdraw as counsel. If an automatic stay is in place, the court does not intend to make any order contrary to the stay. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
